name: Triceratops
traits: Gentle, loyal, and protective of its territory.
description: The Triceratops is the golden retriever of the dinosaur world. Known for its three horns and large frill, it is a sturdy companion that enjoys grazing in large gardens.
ownership_requirement: Standard Herbivore Permit required. Needs at least 2 acres of fenced land.

name: Tyrannosaurus Rex
description: The ultimate apex predator. While majestic, the T-Rex is not for the faint of heart. It requires a firm hand and a deep understanding of predator behavior.
ownership_requirement: Class-A Predator License and reinforced steel containment required.

name: Velociraptor
description: Small but incredibly smart. Raptors are pack animals and thrive when they have mental stimulation and puzzles to solve.
ownership_requirement: Advanced Training Certificate. It is recommended to keep at least two to prevent boredom.

name: Brachiosaurus
description: A literal giant. The Brachiosaurus spends most of its day eating from tall treetops and watching the horizon with a serene expression.
ownership_requirement: No-Fly Zone Permit (due to height) and a constant supply of high-quality foliage.

name: Pterodactyl
description: A magnificent flyer that loves to soar. Pterodactyls are excellent scouts but can be a bit temperamental if kept in small spaces.
ownership_requirement: Aviary Safety License. Must have a covered enclosure or GPS tracking collar.

name: Stegosaurus
traits: Stoic, quiet, and defensive when startled.
description: Famous for the plates on its back and the spikes on its tail. It is a quiet companion that prefers a routine-based lifestyle.
ownership_requirement: Tail-Spike Safety Padding is mandatory for public walks.

name: Ankylosaurus
traits: Stubborn, hardy, and affectionate with owners.
description: The 'tank' of dinosaurs. Its armor makes it nearly indestructible, but underneath that shell is a dino that loves a good chin scratch.
ownership_requirement: Structural Integrity Insurance for your home (in case of accidental tail swings).

name: Parasaurolophus
description: Known for its unique crest that can create hauntingly beautiful sounds. This dino loves to 'sing' to its owners at sunrise.
ownership_requirement: Noise Complaint Waiver or a home in a low-density neighborhood.

name: Archaeopteryx
description: The bridge between dinosaurs and birds. These small, feathered friends are very curious and will follow you around looking for treats.
ownership_requirement: Small Pet Permit. Keep away from larger carnivores.

name: Mosasaurus
description: The king of the ocean. This massive marine reptile is a stunning sight but requires a massive amount of space and specialized care.
ownership_requirement: Deep Water Marine License and a private lagoon of at least 10 million liters.

name: Dilophosaurus
description: Recognizable by its dual crests. It is an expressive dinosaur that uses its frill to communicate mood.
ownership_requirement: Safety Shielding License (due to venomous spit potential).

name: Spinosaurus
description: The largest of all carnivorous dinosaurs. It feels most at home in rivers and coastal regions.
ownership_requirement: Wetland Preservation Permit and a large-scale water filtration system.

name: Plesiosaur
description: The king of the ocean. This massive marine reptile is a stunning sight but requires a massive amount of space and specialized care.
ownership_requirement: Deep Water Marine License and a private lagoon of at least 10 million liters.

name: Soupasaur
description: Recognizable by its dual crests. It is an expressive dinosaur that uses its frill to communicate mood.
ownership_requirement: Safety Shielding License (due to venomous spit potential).

name: Idiotisaur
description: The largest of all carnivorous dinosaurs. It feels most at home in rivers and coastal regions.
ownership_requirement: Wetland Preservation Permit and a large-scale water filtration system.

name: Dino Protein Kibble
description: High-protein meal replacement for active carnivores. Fortified with calcium.

name: Reinforced Leather Harness
description: Extra-strong harness suitable for Large and XL dinosaurs. Weather-resistant.

name: Fern-Flavored Treats
description: Crunchy snacks that every herbivore will love. Perfect for training.

name: High-Intensity Tracking Collar
description: GPS collar with a 50-mile range. Essential for free-roaming aerial species.

name: Dino Grooming Kit
description: Includes a heavy-duty scale brush and claw trimmers.

name: Mega-Sized Chew Toy
description: Indestructible rubber toy designed to withstand T-Rex bite pressure.
